name: ruby-fiber-annotation
title: ruby-fiber-annotation
description:
mechanism for annotating fibers
A simple way to annotate what a fiber is currently doing, useful for
debugging, logging and tracing
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-fiber-annotation because mechanism for annotating fibers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-fiber-annotation as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-fiber-annotation with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-fiber-annotation --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
